install_params.name: repository
install_params.label: GitHub Repository
install_params.description: Repository to watch for pull requests

install_params.name: ssh_secret
install_params.label: SSH Secret
install_params.description: Secret containing the SSH private key for accessing EC2 instances. The key name should be 'private-key'.

install_params.name: ec2_key_name
install_params.label: EC2 Key Pair Name
install_params.description: Name of the AWS EC2 key pair to inject into new instances. Must match the private key in your SSH secret.
